summary: CRITICAL: Test file Assign-PRLabels.Tests.ps1 referenced throughout workflow but not provided—violates core requirement 'all tests must run via Invoke-Pester and pass'. No actionlint validation step in workflow; no evidence of act execution or act-result.txt artifact. Script lacks Set-StrictMode -Version Latest; Bash step missing set -euo pipefail. Redundant inline test logic (workflow lines 57-100) should be in Pester tests. Get-PRLabels duplicates rule-handling logic for array vs hashtable formats (lines 78-95 vs 112-130). PowerShell installation via apt-get is brittle. Missing error propagation in Pester install command. Fundamentally incomplete per requirements: no TDD evidence, no test harness, no CI/CD validation proof.
